name: Creme Anglaise (Vanilla Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the egg yolks and sugar until thick, light in color, and ribbony in texture.
2. Heat the milk and vanilla extract to just below a boil.
3. Slowly pour 3/4 of the hot milk into the egg yolk mixture while whisking vigorously.
4. Return the remaining egg yolk mixture to the saucepan with the milk and heat on low, stirring continuously until thickened.
5. Flavor with cinnamon, Kaluha, or any other extract, spice, or liquor that complements the dessert.
